query: Identify every direct caller and every test of ProjectIndex::map, and state which call sites would need updates if its return type changed.
Identify every direct caller and test of run_retrieval_eval_with_options, then state which call sites would need updates if EvalOptions gained a required field.
Identify every production caller and direct test of MemoryStore::source_withdraw, plus the adjacent result/input types that would change if its return contract changed.
Trace direct callers and tests of maybe_auto_update through the re-exec boundary, naming the exact functions and files affected if AutoUpdateOutcome changed.
Identify every production caller and direct test of CompilerManager::reconcile_upgrade, and the selection persistence helpers it directly depends on.
Identify every caller and direct test coverage of rebuild_project_edges, and list the projection tables it reads or writes.
Identify every caller and direct test of append_projection_candidates, and state which retrieval result fields depend on it.
Identify every production call-site category and direct test of record_metric_best_effort, and state what would break if it began returning Result instead of swallowing failures.
Identify every production caller and direct test of CheckpointStore::put, plus the validation and persistence helpers on its direct path.
Identify every direct caller and test of profile_command, and trace its direct measurement/output helpers that would need updates if stage timing fields changed.
Identify every production caller and direct test of ProjectIndex::index, and state which report fields and projection-rebuild helpers are on its direct path.
Identify every caller and direct test of ProjectIndex::get, and state which citation-validation helpers and result fields would change if bounded reads returned line ranges.
Identify every caller and direct test of ProjectIndex::watch_observed, plus the direct debounce, lock, and reindex path it invokes.
Find the definition and every direct caller/test of call_target_name, then explain which call syntaxes its immediate caller uses it to recover.
Identify every caller and direct test of enforce_project_map_budget, and list the packet sections it directly compacts in priority order.
Identify the production caller and direct tests of MemoryService::handle, and name the dispatch boundary affected if its Response contract changed.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::artifact_revise, plus the validation and persistence helpers on its immediate path.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::claim_revise, and state which lifecycle/conflict behavior its direct path updates.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::relation_put, plus the immediate entity-validation and commit helpers it depends on.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::backup_create, and trace its direct database/CAS synchronization helpers.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::semantic_rebuild, and state which model/index status methods are directly involved.
Find SemanticIndex::search and list the direct functions it calls to produce ranked windows, with direct test evidence.
Find CandleReranker::order and list its direct scoring/calibration dependencies and direct tests.
Identify every production caller and direct test of CompilerManager::compile, and list the direct provider invocation and output-validation helpers.
Identify every production caller and direct test of CompilerManager::configure, and trace the immediate login/model-selection persistence path.
Identify every production caller and direct test of apply_available_update, and list the direct signature, archive, replacement, and managed-install helpers.
Identify every production caller and direct test of check_for_update, and trace its immediate state/cache/manifest decision path.
Identify every production caller and direct test of sync_skills, and state which detected agent roots and atomic-write helpers are directly involved.
Identify every production caller and direct test of MetricsStore::record_event, and state which privacy validation and retention behavior is on its direct path.
Identify every caller and direct test of MetricsStore::record_observation, and list the direct assignment/completion guards affected by a schema change.
Find AmbientResolver::resolve, identify every production caller and direct test, and state the source-precedence helpers on its immediate path.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Cas::put, and trace its direct inline-versus-external integrity path.
Identify every production caller and direct test of CheckpointStore::list, and state how expiry/filtering helpers affect returned summaries.
Identify every caller and direct test of dispatch in src/main.rs, and trace the direct daemon-autostart/request boundary affected by an endpoint contract change.
Identify every caller and direct test of remember_command, and list the immediate source-capture, compiler, quality, and apply helpers it uses.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::projection_put, and state which source-revision and derived-candidate validations are directly enforced.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::feedback_record, and trace its direct target-validation and append-only persistence path.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::conflict_list, and list the immediate scope, pagination, and lifecycle filters it applies.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::source_ingest, and trace its direct checkpoint, revision, and projection-staleness effects.
Identify every production caller and direct test of Store::verify, and list the database, CAS, citation, and projection integrity checks on its direct path.
